import{useRef,useEffect}from'react';import{gsap}from'../lib/gsap';export const useGSAP=function(callback){let deps=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:[];const scope=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const ctx=gsap.context(()=>{callback(gsap,scope.current);},scope);return()=>ctx.revert();// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
},deps);return scope;};
